title: An Antiviral Formulation consisting of Viral DNA Gyrase &  RNA Polymerase Suppressive Protopanaxatriol Analouges for the Treatment of Coronaviral Infections
author: Erdal Can Alkoclar

description: A Formulation with Protopanaxatriol Class Glucopyranoside Analouges that exerts Simultaneous RNA Dependent RNA Polymerase and Viral DNA Gyrase Suppressive Properties for the Treatment of Coronaviral & Adenoviral Infections
